problem_solved: Slow and expensive drug discovery with limited ability to explore chemical space
solution_description: Techbio platform combining high-throughput biology, imaging, and machine learning to discover drugs at scale. Maps cellular phenotypes to identify drug candidates for rare diseases and oncology.
notes: Leading techbio company. Phenotypic drug discovery at scale. Largest biology image dataset. Competes with Insilico, BenevolentAI. Roche/Genentech partnership.
